parameters.name: run_type
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by run type: manual, scheduled.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by status: pending, processing, completed, failed.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Optional. Filter runs from this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Optional. Filter runs to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
